description:
Wire calendar event clicks to navigate to the full event detail page at /events/[id] instead of opening the old internal dialog.

## Requirements

### File: `src/components/calendar-view.tsx`

- Change the `onSelectEvent` callback to use `router.push(/events/${event.id})`
- Remove the old internal Dialog that showed event details
- Month view: make event blocks clickable with cursor-pointer
- Week view: same treatment
- Day view: already covered in the day view task

### Acceptance Criteria
- Clicking ANY event on the calendar navigates to /events/[id]
- Browser back button returns to the calendar at the same date/view
- No more internal dialog overlay for event details

log.action: Task moved to triage — filesystem validation failed
